../docs/多端数据同步源码分析.md.note: fileManager.js 已按 SHA-256 内容哈希存储附件，与需求文档高度吻合。后端 attachments.storage_path 可直接复用 internalFileName 模式（{hash}.ext）。但 extractedText/imageFrames 可能很大（PDF 转 Base64），建议第一版就拆表存储而非塞在 raw_json 中。
群聊 groupchat.js 有 20+ 处 fs.writeJson 写入 history.json，远多于需求文档所述。同步事件生成不能只拦截 save-chat-history IPC，必须统一处理群聊写入点。建议方案：统一写入函数 + Watcher 兜底。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md.note: 已修订文档：确认 VCPToolBox service 插件已有 `hasApiRoutes + registerApiRoutes` 命名空间挂载能力，`VChatSyncCenter` 可直接挂到 `/api/plugins/VChatSyncCenter/*`，不需要新增宿主 API 挂载机制；同时补充说明 `registerApiRoutes` 收到的是 WebSocketServer 模块对象引用，而主 WebSocketServer 的底层 initialize 在 app.listen 回调中执行，路由注册阶段不能默认其已完成初始化。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md.note: 已按 VCPToolBox 当前源码确认：Plugin.js 存在 initializeServices(app, adminApiRouter, projectBasePath)，会在 manifest.hasApiRoutes && module.registerApiRoutes 时挂载到 /api/plugins/{name}，也兼容 registerRoutes(app, adminApiRouter, pluginConfig, projectBasePath) 或 registerRoutes(app, pluginConfig, projectBasePath)。server.js 在 loadPlugins 后 setWebSocketServer 并调用 initializeServices。因此 VChatSyncCenter 可按 hasApiRoutes + registerApiRoutes 落地，无需新增宿主挂载机制；但 WebSocketServer.initialize 在 app.listen 回调内发生，registerApiRoutes 收到的是模块对象引用而非已 initialized 的 WS 实例。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步需求文档.md.note: v4.5 已补充关键落地约束：DeepMemo mtime 排除最新 topic 验收风险、watcher size/mtime 稳定读取与 JSON parse retry、初次接入 mode 前置状态机、附件 _fileManagerData 投影兼容、中心剥离派生内容但桌面可恢复、/operations 单一写入口优先、同步投影写回原子化边界。后续实现不要倒退为 history.json 文件同步或单 msg_id 主键。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步技术实现文档.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步技术实现文档.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步技术实现文档.md.note: v1.1 已按评估报告补齐关键实现约束：完整 DDL/索引/外键策略、server_seq 规则、VCHAT_SYNC_WS_ENABLED、配置 DTO 示例、batch 子事件幂等预留、Adapter 接口兼容、群聊专项语义、remoteGateway 覆盖、投影聚合算法、local_order null 排序、memo/forum 策略、normalized_id 预扫描、M6 写点收口占位。后续实现不要退回 v1.0 的简略表结构或遗漏这些安全边界。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/开发周期总览与索引.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/开发周期总览与索引.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/开发周期总览与索引.md.note: 已按需求文档 v4.6、技术实现文档 v1.1、评估报告与代码事实拆分为 Cycle 0-7：中心骨架、中心 operation、桌面 Adapter、投影闭环、附件配置、bootstrap、测试发布、写点收口增强。后续实施应按这些周期文档推进，避免跳过 message-level/复合身份/atomicWriter/DTO 白名单等安全边界。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/项目周期开发文档/周期开发文档评估报告.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/项目周期开发文档/周期开发文档评估报告.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/项目周期开发文档/周期开发文档评估报告.md.note: 已核对周期评估报告：核心结论基本正确，但 Cycle 2 的 VCPChat registerRoutes 签名被评估报告误判为支持 3/4 参数，源码实际只传 registerRoutes(app, pluginConfig, projectBasePath)；remoteGateway 实际直接写 AppData 范围不小，应覆盖 history/config/forum/memo/settings/文件操作；Cycle 4 需补附件扁平目录兼容，Cycle 2 需补 better-sqlite3/Electron rebuild 或改用纯 JS SQLite。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/项目周期开发文档/开发周期总览与索引.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/项目周期开发文档/开发周期总览与索引.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/项目周期开发文档/开发周期总览与索引.md.note: 已按源码核对修订周期文档：评估报告修正 VCPChat registerRoutes 仅三参数、remoteGateway 写 AppData 范围；Cycle 0 补 schema_migrations/version/checksum/事务/备份策略；Cycle 2 补 better-sqlite3/Electron rebuild 风险、2a/2b 里程碑、remoteGateway 覆盖、流式中间态过滤、localIndex/state/offline_queue 恢复；Cycle 4 补桌面附件扁平目录 AppData/UserData/attachments/{hash}{ext} 兼容。

../VCPToolBox/Plugin/VChatSyncCenter/cor.note: Cycle 5 schema uses migration v4 for bootstrap_sessions and messages.local_order. Earlier migrations v1-v3 are checksum-gated and must not be edited; future bootstrap schema changes need new migration versions.

Cycle 4 schema changes are migration v3 only. Do not edit already-applied migration v1/v2 SQL because checksum gating will refuse startup; future schema changes must be appended as new migration versions.

Cycle 1 adds migration v2 for messages.raw_json/checksum/server_seq/deleted_at and tombstones.retain_until. Because migration checksums are immutable, never edit successful migration v1 SQL; add new versions for schema changes.

Cycle 0 migration uses schema_migrations checksum gating and must refuse startup if an already-successful migration checksum changes. change_log/tombstones/conflicts intentionally avoid strong business-entity FKs; messages PK is (item_type,item_id,topic_id,id), topics PK is (item_id,item_type,id).

Query-string sync_key authentication was removed after review to avoid leaking secrets via URLs/logs. Keep auth to Authorization: Bearer or x-vchat-sync-key unless explicitly re-approved for dev-only use.
VChatSyncCenter /status is gated by VCHAT_SYNC_ENABLED and VCHAT_SYNC_KEY. Default false/change-me must not grant access; logs must not expose token/key values.

Cycle 4 requires center message raw_json/change_log payloads to use sanitized messages only: extractedText/imageFrames/thumbnail-like large derivative fields are stripped and summarized in _syncDerivatives/derivatives. Do not reintroduce raw large file-manager fields into message payloads.

Cycle 1 intentionally does not create attachment placeholders. message attachments are only inserted into message_attachments when attachments(hash) already exists; missing hashes remain in change_log.payload.attachment_refs.skipped so Cycle 4 can upload/link them without blocking message operations.

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: VCPDistributedServer PluginManager expects configSchema values to be plain strings like "boolean"/"integer"/"string". Do not use VCPToolBox object-style {type, default} here unless PluginManager is upgraded, or service config parsing will break.

Cycle 2 safety gate: only mode=active may enqueue or submit operations. uninitialized/recovering must observe without advancing localIndex, otherwise initial changes can be swallowed or corrupt-index recovery can upload duplicate creates.
Cycle 4 实现后，config/attachment events 不再是 blocking unsupported：config 必须经 configProjector 写安全 DTO，attachment 事件至少记录元数据；不要重新把它们加入 unsupported，否则 pullLoop 会卡住 Cycle 4 同步。

Cycle 3 projector intentionally treats config/attachment/unknown events as blocking unsupported until their real projectors are implemented. Do not add them to appliedSeqs without writing AppData, or pullLoop may advance last_applied_seq and permanently skip events.

Cycle 3 projector writes AppData history.json via atomicWriter and records writeIntentLock before writing. Watcher must keep checksum-aware lock handling; otherwise synced remote changes will loop back into offlineQueue.

Cycle 4 config projector now MUST merge safe_projection_json into existing local config: delete schema-managed sync keys, apply remote DTO keys, and preserve local non-sync fields. Do not revert to full DTO overwrite or naive shallow merge.
bootstrapPrimary 在 importBootstrap 成功后必须先 recordBootstrapPrimaryBaseline 写入 messages/configs localIndex，再切 active 并 scanAppData；否则 bootstrap 基线会被 active scan 误判为本地新变更并入队 /operations。

bootstrapPrimary 必须先调用 centerClient.importBootstrap 导入中心基线，再上传本地附件文件；不要在 /bootstrap/import 前调用 uploadLocalAttachment，否则附件上传会写 attachments/change_log，使中心不再为空并触发 `center is not empty; bootstrap_primary refused`。
bootstrapPrimary/joinExisting 备份 AppData 时必须写到 AppData 同级的 `${basename(AppData)}_sync_backups`，不要放回 AppData/sync/backups，否则 fs-extra 会拒绝把 AppData 复制到自身子目录并导致 bootstrap 失败。

Cycle 5 修复后：join_existing 的 baseline events 只使用连续本地 baseline_seq，state.last_applied_seq 仍只取中心 latest_seq，禁止再用 100000/200000 伪 seq 污染游标；merge_existing 必须输出 local_only/center_only/checksum_mismatch diff。

Cycle 5 bootstrap flow backs up AppData before bootstrap_primary/join_existing, scans normalized-id conflicts before import, writes missing history message ids with stable sync_ SHA-based ids through atomicWriter, and keeps merge_existing as report-only by default.

../VCPToolBox/Plugin/VChatSyncCenter/cor.note: Cycle 5 修复后：bootstrap import 会记录 bootstrap_sessions started/completed/failed；export 支持 kind/cursor/limit 分页元数据；messages 导出必须按 local_order/server_seq/id 排序，避免历史顺序丢失。

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: VChatSyncAdapter 现在支持插件目录独立 config.env，且优先级为插件 config.env > 宿主 pluginConfig > 内建默认值；后续不要反向改回仅依赖宿主注入。
Cycle 6 后 requireAdapterAuth 已作为真实鉴权 helper 导出，status/bootstrap/manifest/conflicts 路由和 smoke 测试必须复用该函数；不要在测试中复制一份本地鉴权逻辑以免偏离真实行为。
VChatSyncAdapter 本地 bootstrap/manifest/conflicts API 已复用 VCHAT_SYNC_KEY 鉴权，支持 Authorization Bearer、x-vchat-sync-key、x-vchat-bootstrap-key；未配置或 change-me 必须拒绝。

../VCPToolBox/Plugin/VChatSyncCenter/cor.note: Cycle 6 起中心 SQLite 备份必须用 better-sqlite3 .backup() 且先 wal_checkpoint(FULL)，备份后用独立只读 DB integrity_check + latest_seq 验证；禁止仅复制 .db 文件作为 WAL 模式备份。

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: Cycle 6 状态页依赖 pullLoop.stats() 暴露 last_duration_ms/last_applied/total_events_applied，用于验证 WS 丢包后 REST 补拉与启动同步性能；不要移除这些轻量指标。

../VCPToolBox/WebSocketServer.js.note: VChatSync latest_seq WebSocket (/vchat-sync/latest-seq) 必须通过 registerVChatSyncAuthValidator 注册的校验器验证 Authorization Bearer/x-vchat-sync-key；禁止恢复为无条件接收，否则会泄露同步 latest_seq 通知。

../VCPToolBox/Plugin/VChatSyncCenter/cor.note: 配置 DTO checksum 标准为 sha256(stableJsonStringify({dto_version,schema,entity_id,safe_projection_json}))；Center 是最终校验边界，Adapter/bootstrap/projector 必须保持同一语义，不能退回只 hash safe_projection_json。

Center configService is the final security boundary: config safe_projection_json must pass schema whitelist validation plus sensitive-key scan before checksum/write/change_log. Do not rely only on desktop safeConfigDto.

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: Attachment upload keeps small files as base64 JSON but switches files larger than config.multipartAttachmentThresholdBytes (default 8 MiB) to multipart via centerClient buffer upload. Lazy download/pending_attachment remains intentional.

../VCPToolBox/Plugin/VChatSyncCenter/cor.note: ensureItem/ensureTopic callers may pass null metadata during bootstrap imports because VChat history manifest messages often lack item/topic metadata. Always normalize null/non-object metadata to {} before reading title/summary.

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: 消息同步当前遵循“尽量整条消息透传”语义：diff/buildOperation 发送 payload.message 的完整消息对象，projector 只删除同步内部字段 item_type/item_id/topic_id/local_order/server_seq/server_version/_syncDerivatives/sync_status 后写回 history.json。临时/占位/流式消息会在 diff 阶段被过滤，因此不能宣称‘所有字段/所有消息状态都同步’。
history.json 投影必须保持原生消息结构：不要写入 item_type/item_id/topic_id/local_order/server_seq/server_version/_syncDerivatives/sync_status 等同步内部字段；同步版本/seq/checksum 仅写 localIndex。
message.delete base_version now follows the same confirmed-remote rule as update: only non-null/non-undefined last_known_server_version is treated as confirmed remote existence.
applyLocalSnapshot now merges the previous local_index row before refreshing checksum/pending fields so server-version and repair metadata survive local rescans until projector/queue updates them.

For message sync repair, localIndex existence alone must not be treated as proof of remote existence; create-vs-update decisions should consider last_known_server_version / projector evidence or self-heal on 400 target-missing.

message rows can exist in local_index without any center message/change_log row because applyLocalSnapshot writes them immediately after enqueueMany; if the queue later retains only an update or a create is lost, diffHistory will emit update forever and center rejects with `message update target does not exist`.

P1 repair implemented: when a message.update submit fails with `message update target does not exist` (including axios response.data.error/message), the queue drops that update row, clears pending fields, sets last_known_server_version=null and pending_status=`needs_create` so next local scan recreates the message instead of retrying update forever.

Current queue worker keeps retrying 400 rejects forever and markSubmitted clears pending flags without preserving pending_action. A permanent `message update target does not exist` reject leaves local_index with pending=null so future scans keep generating update instead of recreating missing message.

Smoke test covers both P0 diff behavior (local_index row without confirmed remote server version emits create) and P1 2B self-heal (missing update target rolls back remote-existence assumption and removes the bad update row).

当前代码实际可同步的配置范围以 configSchema/pathRules 为准：Agent config、Agent regex_rules.json（按 agent_config 白名单处理）、Group config、settings.json、forum.config.json；memo.config.json 虽被 watcher/scanner 识别为配置路径，但 schemaForPath 返回 unsupported_config，因此当前实现不会真正入队或投影同步。

当前同步扫描范围不包含 DesktopWidgets、systemPromptPresets、DesktopData：pathRules 只识别 history.json、Agents/*/(config|regex_rules).json、AgentGroups/*/config.json、UserData/(memo|forum).config.json、settings.json，以及头像/attachments/fileManager 类文件。文档 5.4.1 也强调未列入白名单的字段/路径默认不同步。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步开发文档-按新同步范围收敛版.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步开发文档-按新同步范围收敛版.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步开发文档-按新同步范围收敛版.note: 收敛版开发文档已修订：Topic 明确升级为一等实时同步实体，不再作为 Agent/Group config DTO 的 topics 字段夹带同步；本地仍通过 config.json.topics 兼容 UI。实施要求新增 topicDiffEngine/topicProjector，Center 扩展 topicService/topics 表/change_log，ensureTopic 只作为消息乱序或旧客户端兜底。topic.delete 第一版为软删除/隐藏入口，不级联删除 history/message。附件策略明确为第一版消息投影时自动下载优先，失败 pending/可重试。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步开发文档-按新同步范围收敛版.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步开发文档-按新同步范围收敛版.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/VChat多端数据同步开发文档-按新同步范围收敛版.note: 已新增一份按新策略收敛的开发文档：日常实时同步聚焦 Agent/Group 基础列表、Topic、正式消息、附件、必要头像；Agent 详细设置、UI 偏好、forum 非敏感设置仅在首次接入时同步一次，后续默认不参与 watcher 实时同步。

../vcp同步功能开发过程/同步文档评估报告-基于代码实现.md.filePath: ../vcp同步功能开发过程/同步文档评估报告-基于代码实现.md
../vcp同步功能开发过程/同步文档评估报告-基于代码实现.md.note: 已修订评估报告：Topic 不再建议临时放入 AGENT_REALTIME_ALLOWED，而明确升级为一等实时同步实体；本地仍兼容 config.json.topics，但协议层新增 topic.create/update/delete、topicDiffEngine/topicProjector/Center topicService。topic.delete 第一版建议软删除/隐藏入口，不级联删除 history/message。附件下载策略也修正为“metadata event 只记录元数据；带附件消息投影时当前代码会尝试即时下载并重写本机路径”。

VCPDistributedServer/Plugin/VChatSyncAda.note: 2026-05-14 排查：Adapter 状态路由在 5974 正常，pull loop 活跃，但 state/local_index 最后更新停在 09:27；若此后有 AppData/UserData history.json 更新而 sync 状态不变，优先怀疑 chokidar watcher 事件未触发或监听进程未看到实际写入路径。
